deliveryContract.runtimeMechanism: read-only file mount or workload identity

secrets.name: postgres-api-credential
secrets.deliveryAdapter: deployment entrypoint exports the mounted secret file; never store the URL in a ConfigMap
secrets.rotation: dual credential, roll every API replica, then revoke old

secrets.name: postgres-pipeline-credential
secrets.deliveryAdapter: deployment maps a read-only mounted secret or workload identity to the dedicated pipeline login; never reuse the migrator credential
secrets.rotation: dual credential, roll the worker, verify a healthy polling cycle, then revoke old

secrets.name: postgres-outbox-credential
secrets.rotation: dual credential, verify delivery and recovery CLI, then revoke old

secrets.name: postgres-migrator-credential
secrets.deliveryAdapter: job entrypoint reads a mounted file into process environment immediately before exec
secrets.rotation: job-scoped credential, disabled outside controlled operations

secrets.name: redis-broker-credential
secrets.deliveryAdapter: API entrypoint reads a mounted URL file; worker supports the file variable natively
secrets.rotation: overlapping broker credentials with worker readiness verification

secrets.name: object-storage-credential
secrets.rotation: create replacement access key, roll replicas, verify cross-replica read, revoke old

secrets.name: metrics-scrape-token
secrets.rotation: overlap scraper and API acceptance windows

secrets.name: connector-ingress-server-certificate
secrets.rotation: renew before expiry and validate full chain/SAN

secrets.name: connector-ingress-server-private-key
secrets.rotation: new key for every certificate renewal

secrets.name: connector-client-trust-bundle
secrets.rotation: overlap old/new CA bundles until all connector certificates rotate

secrets.name: edge-ingest-client-certificate
secrets.deliveryAdapter: mount as a read-only file and reference only its path from the edge-agent JSON configuration
secrets.rotation: stage replacement certificate and trust bundle, roll the agent, verify mTLS ingest, then revoke old

secrets.name: edge-ingest-client-private-key
secrets.deliveryAdapter: mount as a read-only file with no inline PEM material in configuration, image, or command line
secrets.rotation: generate a new key for every client-certificate replacement and remove the retired key after verification

secrets.name: edge-ingest-server-trust-bundle
secrets.deliveryAdapter: mount as a read-only file when the connector listener uses a private server CA
secrets.rotation: overlap trusted CA bundles until every gateway certificate is renewed
